title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 180 至 430 行，共 948 行) ---
 180 |             print(f"   [策略选择] 工具密集 → KEYFRAME")
 181 |             return CompressionStrategy.KEYFRAME
 182 | 
 183 |         print(f"   [策略选择] 一般对话 → SLIDING_WINDOW")
 184 |         return CompressionStrategy.SLIDING_WINDOW
 185 | 
 186 |     # ========== 策略 1: LLM 摘要 ==========
 187 | 
 188 |     async def _compress_with_llm(
 189 |         self,
 190 |         messages: List[Dict[str, Any]],
 191 |         llm_summarizer_func: Optional[Callable],
 192 |         existing_summary: str,
 193 |         min_keep: int
 194 |     ) -> CompressionResult:
 195 |         """
 196 |         使用 LLM 生成摘要（当前策略）
 197 | 
 198 |         🔥 Phase 2 优化：
 199 |         - 添加缓存机制（避免重复调用）
 200 |         - 添加频率限制（每小时最多 10 次）
 201 |         - 超限时降级到 SLIDING_WINDOW
 202 | 
 203 |         Args:
 204 |             messages: 消息列表
 205 |             llm_summarizer_func: LLM 摘要函数
 206 |             existing_summary: 已有的摘要
 207 |             min_keep: 最少保留的消息数量
 208 | 
 209 |         Returns:
 210 |             CompressionResult
 211 |         """
 212 |         if not llm_summarizer_func:
 213 |             print("   [警告] LLM_SUMMARY 策略需要 llm_summarizer_func，降级到 SLIDING_WINDOW")
 214 |             return self._compress_with_sliding_window(messages, 0.3, min_keep)
 215 | 
 216 |         # 划分消息：最近完整 turn 原样保留，较旧完整 turn 作为摘要候选。
 217 |         keep_messages = self._select_recent_complete_turn_messages(messages, min_keep)
 218 |         keep_start = len(messages)
 219 |         if keep_messages:
 220 |             keep_start = min(
 221 |                 messages.index(msg)
 222 |                 for msg in keep_messages
 223 |                 if msg in messages
 224 |             )
 225 |         to_summarize = self._select_summary_candidate_messages(messages[:keep_start])
 226 | 
 227 |         # 🔥 Phase 2: 检查缓存
 228 |         messages_hash = self._get_messages_hash(to_summarize)
 229 |         if messages_hash in self.summary_cache:
 230 |             print(f"   ✅ 命中缓存：直接使用已有摘要")
 231 |             cached_summary = self.summary_cache[messages_hash]
 232 |             return CompressionResult(
 233 |                 success=True,
 234 |                 strategy=CompressionStrategy.LLM_SUMMARY,
 235 |                 compressed_messages=keep_messages,
 236 |                 summary=cached_summary,
 237 |                 compression_ratio=len(keep_messages) / len(messages) if messages else 0,
 238 |                 original_count=len(messages),
 239 |                 compressed_count=len(keep_messages),
 240 |                 metadata={"from_cache": True, "cache_hit": messages_hash}
 241 |             )
 242 | 
 243 |         # 🔥 Phase 2: 检查频率限制
 244 |         if not self._should_call_llm():
 245 |             print(f"   ⚠️  LLM 调用超限，降级到 SLIDING_WINDOW")
 246 |             return self._compress_with_sliding_window(messages, 0.3, min_keep)
 247 | 
 248 |         # 生成摘要
 249 |         prompt = SUMMARY_PROMPT_TEMPLATE_V2.format(
 250 |             existing_summary=existing_summary or "无",
 251 |             messages_to_summarize=str(to_summarize)
 252 |         )
 253 | 
 254 |         try:
 255 |             summary_text = await llm_summarizer_func(prompt)
 256 | 
 257 |             # 🔥 Phase 2: 记录调用
 258 |             self._record_llm_call()
 259 | 
 260 |             if not summary_text:
 261 |                 return CompressionResult(
 262 |                     success=False,
 263 |                     strategy=CompressionStrategy.LLM_SUMMARY,
 264 |                     compressed_messages=keep_messages,
 265 |                     original_count=len(messages),
 266 |                     compressed_count=len(keep_messages)
 267 |                 )
 268 | 
 269 |             # 解析结构化摘要
 270 |             summary = self._parse_structured_summary(
 271 |                 summary_text, to_summarize, 0.5
 272 |             )
 273 | 
 274 |             # 🔥 Phase 2: 缓存结果
